name: Bank of Gleason
description_short: Bank of Gleason is a community bank established in 1901 offering traditional banking services including checking, savings, credit cards, and retirement accounts.
description_long: Bank of Gleason has operated as a hometown bank since 1901, establishing itself as a long-standing financial institution in its community. The bank provides comprehensive banking services accessible through multiple channels including online banking, mobile banking, and physical locations with ATM networks. The company offers a range of core banking products: checking and savings accounts, Individual Retirement Accounts (IRAs), Visa credit cards, debit/ATM cards, and calculators for financial planning. They provide both personal and business banking enrollment options, with dedicated support for business clients. Online banking access and mobile banking platforms enable customers to manage accounts remotely, while their ATM locator helps customers find convenient cash access points. Bank of Gleason distinguishes itself through its emphasis on community banking and long operational history spanning over 120 years. The bank maintains a customer service focus with multiple contact methods including phone support (731-648-5506 for standard hours and 1-833-337-6075 for after-hours), online contact forms, and physical branch locations. They also provide dedicated support for lost or stolen cards through their customer service channels. As a traditional community bank, Bank of Gleason serves customers seeking established, full-service banking relationships rather than specialized financial services. The website provides basic product information but limited detail on rates, fees, or specific product terms. Prospective customers should contact the bank directly for comprehensive information about account features, minimum balances, and competitive offerings compared to larger financial institutions.
services: Debit/ATM cards with lost or stolen card replacement
Online banking platform with login and account access
pros: Established community bank with 120+ years of operational history since 1901
Offers both personal and business banking accounts with dedicated enrollment options
Multiple contact channels including phone support (standard and after-hours), online forms, and physical locations
Mobile banking and online banking platforms for remote account access
ATM locator service for convenient cash access across their network
Visa credit card products available for cardholders
IRA and retirement savings account options for long-term investing
cons: Limited product information and rate details available on website
No transparent fee schedule or account comparison tools displayed
Minimal information about competitive advantages versus larger national banks
No details on minimum deposit requirements or eligibility criteria
Website lacks information about FDIC insurance coverage and account limits
best_for: Customers seeking traditional community banking relationships and local branch access
Small business owners needing business checking and banking services
Community members prioritizing long-established, locally-rooted financial institutions
diagnosis: Bank of Gleason is best suited for customers seeking traditional banking services from an established community institution with over a century of history. The main caveat is that the website provides limited transparency on rates, fees, and specific product terms, requiring direct contact with the bank for detailed information before opening accounts.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
